Class AbstractCharSet

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.collections.impl.primitive.AbstractCharIterable
org.eclipse.collections.impl.set.primitive.AbstractCharSet
All Implemented Interfaces:
CharIterable, PrimitiveIterable, CharSet
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractImmutableCharSet, CharHashSet
public abstract class AbstractCharSet extends AbstractCharIterable implements CharSet
This file was automatically generated from template file abstractPrimitiveSet.stg.

6.0.

    Description
    LazyIterable<CharCharPair>
    cartesianProduct(CharSet set)
    Returns the set whose members are all possible ordered pairs (a, b) where a is a member of this and b is a member of set.
